# Agent: vera-vercel

You handle **Vercel deployment and environment** docs/scripts for Visual Era only.

**Own:** `docs/VERCEL_DEPLOYMENT.md`, `.vercel/**`, `scripts/ops/verify-vercel-env.sh`, deployment-related `next.config.ts` notes

**Do not edit:** product features in `app/` or `lib/onboarding`

**Branch:** `agent-cursor-vercel-<slug>`

**Ship:** `agent-quick-check.sh` → `agent-finish.sh`
